scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner misses liquid biopsy category entirely — NTRA's Signatera MRD growth and CMS coverage catalyst don't fit traditional fundamental screens due to negative trailing earnings but massive forward revenue step-change
Scanner underweights defensive compounders with utility-like characteristics; RSG's landfill gas ESG premium and pricing power above inflation are qualitative moats invisible to quantitative screens
Scanner missed DVN as scanner's energy coverage likely excludes 50%+ down-from-high names after energy sector out-of-favor; E&P at $50 WTI break-even with variable dividend is a contrarian value play
SkyWater classified government contracts aren't disclosed in public data; CHIPS Act beneficiary angle requires thematic geopolitical research the scanner's quantitative approach cannot surface
Pre-revenue biotech with binary FDA catalyst is structurally excluded from scanner's fundamentals-based universe; Phase 3 read-out quality requires clinical trial literature review
IP licensing pure-play with zero inventory/manufacturing metrics; scanner likely screens out low-revenue companies missing scale thresholds despite 65% gross margins
Everest Group specialty reinsurance is sector-specific with unique combined ratio metrics; scanner's generic fundamental screening misses hardening cycle dynamics in specialty P&C

Flutter listed on NYSE only in 2024; limited US-market data history makes quantitative screening unreliable; FanDuel profitability inflection requires forward model rather than backward-looking fundamentals
Cognizant Elliott Management activist angle requires 13F monitoring; scanner doesn't synthesize activist ownership signals with fundamental recovery trajectories
Small-cap space infrastructure with sparse analyst coverage falls below scanner's data reliability threshold; requires thematic space economy research
Scanner may de-prioritize premium-valued names; Arista's AI hyperscaler positioning requires reading hyperscaler capex guidance to understand forward demand — a qualitative research step
